Avvik: 137 | Bestått: 483
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="frontpage__campaign-image embed-responsive-item" loading="lazy" src="/48d40e/globalassets/1-sodir/fakta/nyheter/generelle-nyheter/rune_og_gassprovetaker_2.jpg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Ung kildebergart er utbredt i Norskehavet</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (72 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (112 characters)

<a aria-label="Høring – forslag til endringer i ressursforskriften og forskrift om dokumentasjon ved lagring av CO₂ på sokkelen" href="/regelverk/horinger/horing--forslag-til-endringer-i-ressursforskr
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

MINOR

Link text is very long (112 characters)

<a aria-label="Høring – forslag til endringer i ressursforskriften og forskrift om dokumentasjon ved lagring av CO₂ på sokkelen" href="/regelverk/horinger/horing--forslag-til-endringer-i-ressursforskr
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive

<a aria-label="Høring – forslag til ny forskrift om datainnsamling og dokumentasjon i mineralvirksomhet på kontinentalsokkelen" href="/regelverk/horinger/horing--forslag-til-ny-forskrift-om-datainnsam

<a aria-controls="m_c08f2274-cdc2-4573-a200-9442940221fa" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_c08f2274-cdc2-4573-a200-9442940221fa" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (60 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-controls="m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a aria-controls="m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

Varsling og rapportering i samsvar med paragraf 79a i petroleumsforskrifta - Sokkeldirektoratet

https://www.sodir.no/regelverk/rapportering/beredskap/
Avvik: 148 | Bestått: 473
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Leiteboring</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (82 avvik)

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-controls="m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

MODERATE

<a aria-controls="m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (173 characters)

<a class="doc" download="" href="/48fec3/globalassets/1-sodir/regelverk/veiledninger/pud-og-pad-n.pdf"> <div class="d-flex"> <div class="doc__icon"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-file-pdf ico
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (60 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page

<a aria-label="Høring – forslag til endringer i ressursforskriften og forskrift om dokumentasjon ved lagring av CO₂ på sokkelen" href="/regelverk/horinger/horing--forslag-til-endringer-i-ressursforskr

CRITICAL

<a aria-controls="m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-controls="m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/om-oss/kontakt-oss/invitasjoner/" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Les meir om konferansar og arrangement">Les meir her om konferansar og andre arrangement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

MINOR

Link text is very long (112 characters)

<a aria-label="Høring – forslag til endringer i ressursforskriften og forskrift om dokumentasjon ved lagring av CO₂ på sokkelen" href="/regelverk/horinger/horing--forslag-til-endringer-i-ressursforskr
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (111 characters)

<a aria-label="Høring – forslag til ny forskrift om datainnsamling og dokumentasjon i mineralvirksomhet på kontinentalsokkelen" href="/regelverk/horinger/horing--forslag-til-ny-forskrift-om-datainnsam
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive

<a aria-label="Høring – forslag til endringer i ressursforskriften og forskrift om dokumentasjon ved lagring av CO2 på sokkelen" href="/regelverk/horinger/horing-forslag-til-endringer-i-ressursforskri

<a aria-controls="m_c08f2274-cdc2-4573-a200-9442940221fa" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_c08f2274-cdc2-4573-a200-9442940221fa" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (60 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-controls="m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

MINOR

Link text is very long (112 characters)

<a aria-label="Høring – forslag til endringer i ressursforskriften og forskrift om dokumentasjon ved lagring av CO₂ på sokkelen" href="/regelverk/horinger/horing--forslag-til-endringer-i-ressursforskr
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (111 characters)

<a aria-label="Høring – forslag til ny forskrift om datainnsamling og dokumentasjon i mineralvirksomhet på kontinentalsokkelen" href="/regelverk/horinger/horing--forslag-til-ny-forskrift-om-datainnsam
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

<a aria-controls="m_c08f2274-cdc2-4573-a200-9442940221fa" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_c08f2274-cdc2-4573-a200-9442940221fa" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

<a aria-controls="m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/fakta/havbunnsmineraler/undersokelsestillatelser/" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Lovverket">ref lovverket</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.regjeringen.no/no/tema/energi/olje-og-gass/kunnskapsinnhenting-og-konsekvensutredning/apning-av-omrader-for-mineralvirksomhet-pa-deler-av-norsk-kontinentalsokkel/id2871504/" rel="
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/48cc37/globalassets/1-sodir/regelverk/horinger/no/horing-indeksregulering-av-arealavgift.pdf" target="_blank" title="Høringsbrev"> Høringsbrev </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/48cc37/globalassets/1-sodir/regelverk/horinger/no/horing-indeksregulering-av-arealavgift.pdf" target="_blank" title="Høringsbrev"> Høringsbrev </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-controls="m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

Søknad om undersøkelsestillatelse for gjeldende år - Sokkeldirektoratet

https://www.sodir.no/fakta/geofysiske-undersokelser/selskaper-med-undersokelsestillatelser/soknad-om-undersokelsestillatelse/
Avvik: 136 | Bestått: 453
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>§ 3. Søknad om undersøkelsestillatelse</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (70 avvik)

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_cbe0f19a-ee2a-423b-88e6-e3440d9e435f" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_cbe0f19a-ee2a-423b-88e6-e3440d9e435f" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_45e6a7a8-be00-4a0b-9eaf-a42bc9c0986f" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_45e6a7a8-be00-4a0b-9eaf-a42bc9c0986f" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (112 characters)

<a aria-label="Høring – forslag til endringer i ressursforskriften og forskrift om dokumentasjon ved lagring av CO₂ på sokkelen" href="/regelverk/horinger/horing--forslag-til-endringer-i-ressursforskr
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (111 characters)

<a aria-label="Høring – forslag til ny forskrift om datainnsamling og dokumentasjon i mineralvirksomhet på kontinentalsokkelen" href="/regelverk/horinger/horing--forslag-til-ny-forskrift-om-datainnsam

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_c08f2274-cdc2-4573-a200-9442940221fa" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_c08f2274-cdc2-4573-a200-9442940221fa" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/492d8a/globalassets/1-sodir/fakta/utvinningstillatelser/konsesjonsrunder-nor/tfo-2019/tildelinger/tfo-2019-kart.pdf" target="_blank" title="Kart over tildelte lisenser (pdf)">
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/493364/globalassets/1-sodir/fakta/utvinningstillatelser/konsesjonsrunder-nor/tfo-2019/tildelinger/tfo-2019-tildelinger-med-arbeidsprogram.pdf" target="_blank" title="Tildeling med arbeidspro

<a href="/492dd3/globalassets/1-sodir/fakta/utvinningstillatelser/konsesjonsrunder-nor/tfo-2019/tildelinger/tfo-2019-partnere.xlsx" target="_blank" title="Partnere i tildelte lisenser (excel)">

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Seismiske undersøkelser</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

<a aria-controls="m_c08f2274-cdc2-4573-a200-9442940221fa" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_c08f2274-cdc2-4573-a200-9442940221fa" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/4945ca/globalassets/1-sodir/fakta/seismikk/kjopsbetingelser-datapakker-no-og-eng.pdf" target="_blank" title="Kjøpsbetingelser (pdf)"> Kjøpsbetingelser (pdf)
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/4945ca/globalassets/1-sodir/fakta/seismikk/bestillingsskjema_pk_061_no.pdf" target="_blank" title="Bestillingsskjema (pdf)"> Bestillingsskjema (pdf) </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/494603/globalassets/1-sodir/fakta/seismikk/oversikt-diskos-data.xlsx" target="_blank" title="Oversikt over Diskos datasett (excel)"> Oversikt over Diskos datasett (excel)
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/49410c/globalassets/1-sodir/fakta/seismikk/npd_pk060_shapefiles.zip" target="_blank" title="Linjetraseer og 3D omriss (shape-zip)"> Linjetraseer og 3D omriss (shape-zip)
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page

Link text is very long (112 characters)

<a aria-label="Høring – forslag til endringer i ressursforskriften og forskrift om dokumentasjon ved lagring av CO₂ på sokkelen" href="/regelverk/horinger/horing--forslag-til-endringer-i-ressursforskr

CRITICAL

<a aria-controls="m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_8dd1118a-f276-402d-bbc2-42f565b22143" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_2ae83613-d653-46e6-b520-ac81dfb55471" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-controls="m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

https://www.sodir.no/regelverk/rapportering/nettportalen-smil/veiledning-til-smil/
Avvik: 136 | Bestått: 460
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3><br/>Tilgang til SMIL via L2S</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (70 avvik)

Link text is very long (112 characters)

<a aria-label="Høring – forslag til endringer i ressursforskriften og forskrift om dokumentasjon ved lagring av CO₂ på sokkelen" href="/regelverk/horinger/horing--forslag-til-endringer-i-ressursforskr

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="window.print();"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas fa-print so-me__share__icon"></i>Skriv ut </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/force/" target="_blank">force.org</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/en/diskos/" target="_blank">diskos.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-controls="m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" aria-expanded="false" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="but

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'

MODERATE

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/3cc0a945-fe81-4890-acdb-3f735578ef9f" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div class="sh-content-header" onclick="showContent('id-e66816fc-0fcc-495b-9d62-ed91f41a5d76')"> <h3>Hovedmål</h3> </div>
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div class="sh-content-arrow-holder" data-exp="Ekspander" data-min="Minimer" onclick="showContent('id-e66816fc-0fcc-495b-9d62-ed91f41a5d76')" title="Ekspander"><i class="sh-content-arrow arrowdown" na
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="share_linkedin" onclick="openShareUrl(event);" target="_blank"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-linkedin-in so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på LinkedIn </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (61 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label'

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×10 across article pages)

<a href="https://www.norskpetroleum.no/" target="_blank">norskpetroleum.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button (×3 across article pages)

<a href="#" onclick="new CustomModal('cookie-consent-modal').open(); return false;">Informasjonskapsler</a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label (×2 across article pages)

<input id="cookieOverlay" style="display:none;" value="Du må godkjenne informasjonskapsler for å vise dette innholdet."/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order (×2 across article pages)

<a class="skip-link" href="#main" tabindex="1">Til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name (×1 across article pages)

<div "-"="" +"="" aria-controls="changeFontSize" aria-expanded="false" class="collapse change-font-size" data-content="Hold Ctrl-tasten (PC) eller Cmd-tasten (MAC) nede og trykk på " data-target="#cha
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: '3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label' (×1 across article pages)

<form aria-labelledby="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-979c-8bd4bd652cf8_label" class="EPiServerForms ValidationSuccess" data-f-metadata="" data-f-type="form" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="3177b3e4-1f3b-4e9d-9
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button' (×60 across article pages)

<a aria-controls="m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" aria-expanded="true" class="fa fa-angle-down" data-target="#m_064b6f7e-331b-4e11-9f99-37ee4981e179" data-toggle="collapse" href="#" role="butt
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible (×2 across article pages)

<a class="share_facebook" onclick="openShareUrl(event);"> <i aria-hidden="true" class="fab fa-facebook-f so-me__share__icon"></i>Del på Facebook </a>
Add href attribute or use a button element

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler
